# MetroBuild Expo Brand Brief

Use this only for compact brand context. Current campaign requirements in latest_update.md and platform_specs.txt take priority.

- Brand tone: practical, architectural, confident, and easy to navigate.
- Current primary color: Metro blue `#0057D9`.
- Current support colors: signal yellow `#FFD447`, concrete `#EEF1F4`, ink black `#101820`, and white.
- Current logo: use the MetroBuild Expo wordmark only, placed cleanly below the Instagram Story top safe zone.
- Do not use old maroon/gold colors, the old block-M logo, gala styling, sponsor logo walls, or unverified ranking claims.
- Old brand files are archive references only and must not define the current campaign content.
